titleSuccess.description: Label that is shown alongside a message saying that an action was successful.

titleImportant.description: Label that is shown alongside a message that requires the user’s attention.

titleAccessDenied.description: Label that is shown alongside a message saying that the user does not have permission to do something.

messageLogInBlocked.message: You are not allowed to log in.
messageLogInBlocked.description: Message shown when a user is blocked from logging in.

messageLoggedOut.description: Message shown when a user has logged out.

messageLoggedIn.description: Message shown when a user has logged in.

messageLoggedInDemoUser.message: You have been logged in as a demo user.
messageLoggedInDemoUser.description: Message shown when you have logged in as a special user for demonstration purposes.

messageVerifyEmail.message: We’re sending you an email. Please open it and follow the link to verify your address.
messageVerifyEmail.description: Message shown when a user has requested to verify their email address.

messageVerifyEmailResend.message: We’ve sent you a new email.
messageVerifyEmailResend.description: Message shown when a user has requested to resend the verification email.

messageEmailVerified.message: Your email address has been verified.
messageEmailVerified.description: Message shown when a user has successfully verified their email address.

messageOrcidConnected.message: Your ORCID record has been connected.
messageOrcidConnected.description: Message shown when a user has successfully connected their ORCID record.

messageOrcidDisconnected.message: Your ORCID record has been disconnected.
messageOrcidDisconnected.description: Message shown when a user has successfully disconnected their ORCID record.

messageSlackConnected.message: Your Community Slack account has been connected.
messageSlackConnected.description: Message shown when a user has successfully connected their Community Slack account.

messageSlackDisconnected.message: Your Community Slack account has been disconnected.
messageSlackDisconnected.description: Message shown when a user has successfully disconnected their Community Slack account.

messageAvatarChanged.description: Message shown when a user has successfully changed their avatar.

messageAvatarRemoved.description: Message shown when a user has successfully removed their avatar.
